meta.title: Flash Diagnostics Hub | Android Flashing, Firmware Diagnostics & Guides
meta.description: Complete guide to flashing mobile devices — Motorola, Samsung Odin, Fastboot, SP Flash, Unisoc/UFS, Qualcomm EDL, bootloop, hardbrick, FRP and secure firmware sharing. Official tools, step-by-step procedures and download links.
meta.tagline: Flashing, firmware diagnostics and secure file sharing for Android devices.
meta.ogImageAlt: Flash Diagnostics Hub — Motorola, Samsung, Xiaomi, Unisoc flashing, diagnostics and secure sharing
meta.about: Android mobile device flashing and diagnostics

hero.subtitle: Complete hub for Android device flashing and diagnostics — Motorola, Samsung Odin, Fastboot, SP Flash, Unisoc/UFS, Qualcomm EDL, bootloop, hardbrick and secure firmware sharing.

toolsShowcase.title: 🛠 Tools & brands
toolsShowcase.description: Click a logo to jump directly to the guide or download section.

flashovanie.title: Device flashing
flashovanie.description: Choose a brand or flashing method — Motorola, Samsung, MediaTek, Unisoc/UFS and more. Each category includes procedures, tips and tool links.

diagnostika.title: Problem diagnostics
diagnostika.description: Diagnose bootloop, brick, EDL mode and USB issues. Dedicated section for Motorola-specific errors including radio, IMEI and bootloader warnings.

nastroje.title: Tools & firmware
nastroje.description: Official flash tools (RSA, LMSA, Odin, Mi Flash, SP Flash), USB drivers and firmware catalogs for Motorola, Samsung, Xiaomi and Google Pixel.

zdielanie.title: Secure sharing
zdielanie.description: Interactive tool to create password-protected ZIP archives (AES-256) and securely share firmware and sensitive files.

safetyWarning.title: Safety notice
safetyWarning.text: Always use only official or verified tools and firmware for the exact device model. Back up important data before any intervention. Incorrect flashing can permanently damage the device.

sharing.step1Content:
Right-click folder → 7-Zip → Add to archive
Archive format: zip
Encryption method: AES-256
Password: {password}
sharing.copyInstruction: Right-click → 7-Zip → Add to archive → AES-256 + password: {password}
step2Items: SwissTransfer.com or WeTransfer (with password in a separate message)
Private GitHub repo + password via Signal/Threema
Proton Drive / Mega.nz with end-to-end encryption
sharing.securityTip: Security tip: Never send the password through the same channel as the file.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about flashing, firmware diagnostics and secure file sharing for Android devices.

items.question: How to flash a Motorola phone?
items.answer: Unlock the bootloader via the official Motorola website, download RETAIL firmware for the exact XT-xxxx model and flash via fastboot or Motorola Rescue and Smart Assistant (RSA/LMSA). Step-by-step procedure is in the Motorola section.

items.question: What is Samsung Odin and how to use it?
items.answer: Odin is a tool for flashing Samsung Galaxy in Download mode. Load AP, BL, CP and CSC files from the firmware package, connect the phone and start flashing. Detailed guide is in the Odin (Samsung) section.

items.question: How to fix bootloop or brick?
items.answer: First identify the device mode (fastboot, Download, EDL, MTK). Then re-flash the last working stock ROM via the appropriate tool — Odin, fastboot, SP Flash or LMSA. The Diagnostics section contains procedures by severity.

items.question: How to securely share firmware files?
items.answer: Pack files into a ZIP archive with AES-256 encryption (7-Zip), upload to SwissTransfer or Proton Drive and send the password through a different channel than the file link. Instruction generator is in the Secure sharing section.

items.question: What is Unisoc flash and UFS memory?
items.answer: Unisoc (Spreadtrum) devices are flashed via Research Download / SPD tool with PAC firmware. UFS is faster storage — requires the exact firmware variant. Guides including FRP and hardbrick recovery are in the Unisoc & UFS section.

chat.title: FD Hub assistant
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm the FD Hub assistant. I can help with flashing, diagnostics and tools. What do you need?
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm the Flash Diagnostics Hub assistant. I can help with flashing, diagnostics, tools or secure firmware sharing. Pick a question below or type what you need.
chat.fallback: I don't have a precise answer for that. Try rephrasing (e.g. Motorola, Odin, bootloop, Unisoc) or check the Flashing, Diagnostics and FAQ sections on the page.
